title: Roller reamer
abstract: A roller reamer having an elongate tubular body with a first end adapted to be connected in a drill string and a second end adapted to be connected in a drill string. There are a plurality of circumferentlally spaced pockets formed in the outer wall of the oody and a roller assembly mounted in each of the pockets. There are a plurality of longitudinally extending, circumferehtialiy spaced channels formed in the outer wall of the body, each of the channels having an axially extending run in open communication with a helically extending run. Respective ones of the axially extending runs are disposed between respective pairs of the pockets,
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A roller reamer comprising: an elongate tubular body having a long axis, an outer wall, a first end adapted to be connected to a drill string, and a second end adapted to be connected to a drill string, there being a plurality of circumferentially spaced pockets formed in said outer wail of said body; a roller assembly mounted in each of said pockets; there being a plurality of longitudinally extending circumferentially spaced channels formed in said outer wall of said body, each of said channels having an axially extending run in open communication with a helically extending run and respective ones of said axially extending runs being disposed between respective ones of said pockets. 2. The roller reamer of claim 1 , wherein there are three equally spaced pockets. 3. The roller reamer of claim 1, wherein mere is at least one annular band on said body intermediate said first and second ends. 4. The roller reamer of claim 3, wherein said helical runs are formed in said band. 5. The roller reamer of claim 4, wherein there are first and second axially spaced bands, each of said first and second axially spaced bands having a plurality of circumferentially spaced helical channels, respective ones of said axial channels providing open communication between respective ones of said helical channels on said first and second bands. 6. The roller reamer of claim 3, wherein there is a first array of circumferentially spaced pockets, and a second axially spaced array of circumferentially spaced pockets, said at least one annular band being disposed 

 between said first and second array of pockets, said first array of pockets being circumferentially displaced relative to said second array of pockets. 7. The roller reamer of claim 6, wherein there is a first array of longitudinally extending channels, respective axial runs of said first array of said longitudinally extending channels being disposed between adjacent pockets of said first array of pockets and a second array of longitudinally extending channels, respective axial runs of said second array of longitudinally extending channels being disposed between adjacent pockets of said second array of pockets, respective runs of said helical channels providing open communication between respective runs of said axialiy extending runs in said first array of longitudinally extending channels and respective ones of said axialiy extending runs in said second array of longitudinally extending channels. 8. The roller reamer of claim 1, wherein said axialiy extending runs are parallel to said long axis. 9. The roller reamer of claim 1 , wherein each of said roller assemblies comprises: a roller body having first and second ends, a first roller shaft extending axialiy from said first end of said roller body and a second roller shaft extending axialiy from said second end of said roller body; a first pillow block for receiving said first shaft of said roller body and a second pillow block for receiving said second shaft of said roller body, each of said pillow blocks comprising at least one radial bearing assembly and a thrust bearing assembly. 10. The roller reamer of claim 9, wherein each of said first and second pillow blocks comprises a generally rectangular body, each of said pillow blocks having a first side surface, a second side surface, and a bottom surface, said first side surface being at an oblique angle to said bottom surface. 11. The roller reamer of claim 10, wherein each of said pockets comprises a center portion, a first end portion, and a second end portion, each of said first and second end portions comprising an axially extending bottom wall, an axially extending first side wall, an axially extending second side wail, and a radially extending end wall, said first side face of said pillow block being spaced from said first side wall, said first pillow block being received in said first end portion, said second pillow block being received in said second end portion; a lock block disposed between each of said first side wails of said pockets and each of said first side surfaces of said pillow blocks, said lock block having a first side face, a second side face, and a bottom face, said first side face being at an oblique angle which is supplementary to the angle of said first side surface of said pillow block. 12. The roller reamer of claim 11, wherein each of said lock blocks is secured to said bottom wall by a compression assembly operative to force said lock block into wedging engagement with said pillow block and said pocket. 13. The roller reamer of claim 11, wherein each of said pillow blocks has a first end face, an axially extending bore being formed in said first end face, and a plug received in each of said bores, said plug at least partially defining a reservoir for a lubricant, a pressure imparting assembly carried by said plug, said pressure imparting assembly being operative to force lubricant into lubricating engagement with said bearing assembly by the application of fluid pressure acting on said roller reamer externally of said roller reamer. 14. The roller reamer of claim 9, wherein each of said first and second shafts has a first axially extending portion, a second axially extending portion, and a third axially extending portion, there being a first radial bearing assembly in surrounding relation to said first axial portion, a thrust bearing assembly in 

 surrounding relationship to said second axial portion and a second radial bearing assembly in surrounding relation to said third axial portion. 15. The roller reamer of claim 14, wherein said first portion has a larger outer diameter than said second portion and said second portion has a larger outer diameter than said third portion. 16. The roller reamer of claim 10, wherein each of said pillow blocks has a second end face proximal a respective end of said roller body and there is a seal assembly between said second end face and said respective end of said roller body. 17. The roller reamer of claim 16. wherein said seal assembly forms a labyrinth seal between said second end face of said pillow block and said respective end of said roller body. 18. The roller reamer of claim 14, wherein each of said first and second radial bearing assemblies comprises a needle roller bearing assembly, and said thrust bearing assembly comprises a thrust needle roller bearing assembly. 19. The roller reamer of claim 18, wherein all of said bearing assemblies are in open communication with said reservoir of lubricant. 20. A locking assembly for compressive^ holding a first member into engagement with a second member comprising: a first member having a first side surface, a spaced second side surface, and a bottom surface, said second surface being at an oblique angle to said bottom surface; a second member having a first side wall, a second side wail, and a bottom wall, said second wall being spaced from said second surface; 

 a locking block having a first side face, a second side face, and a bottom face, said first side face being at an oblique angle to said bottom face, said angle of said first face being supplemental to said angle of said second surface, said locking block being positioned between said second side surface and said second side wall; a compression assembly operativety connected to said locking block to urge said bottom face of said locking block toward said bottom wall, said first face of said locking block being forced against said second face of said first member, and said second face of said locking block being forced said second wall
